Lysis Buffer for 500 ul for 10-20 mg starting material","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d8mh2","text":"2.5 volume of Buffer A 187.5 ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9v60r","text":"2.5 volume of Buffer B 187.5 ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"83lo1","text":"1.0 volume of Buffer C 75 ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dfsbl","text":"PVP 0.1 % 50 ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9156p","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect tissue/spores (10-20mg) in a 2ml eppendorf tube with one metal bead. lyse tissue/spores with liquid nitrogen in a precooled tissuelycer. using 50Hz for 1min.

Make lysis buffer by mixing buffer A+B+C (2.5:2.5:1 + 0.1%PVP final) and briefly heat to 64 °C. Let cool to room temperature, add RNAse T1 to lysis buffer according to 1:1750 of RNAse T1:lysis buffer ratio
Add 500ul lysis buffer into the powder, briefly vortex, incubate at 64oC for 30 mins 00:30:00
Cool on ice for 5 mins 00:05:00
Add 100 ul (0.2 vol) of KAc 5M, mix by inversion, incubate on ice for max 5 mins 00:05:00
Spin at 4 o C at max speed for 10 mins 00:10:00
Transfer supernatant to fresh eppendorf tube containing 500ul (1vol) (P/C/I) and mix by inversion for 2 mins 00:02:00
Spin at 4 °C and max speed for 10 mins 00:10:00
Transfer supernatant (~400ul) to fresh eppendorf tube containing 500ul RT isopropanol
Incubate at RT for 5-10mins 00:10:00
Spin at 4 °C and max speed for 30 mins 00:30:00
Carefully remove supernatant with pipette and wash with 1mL fresh 70% Ethanol, invert several times to dislodge pellet
Spin in table top centrifuge for 5mins at 13000g 00:05:00
Remove supernatant with pipette and wash with 1mL fresh 70% Ethanol, invert several times to dislodge pellet
Spin in table top centrifuge for 5mins at 13000g 00:05:00
Remove supernatant with pipette
Spin in table top centrifuge for 1min at 13000g 00:01:00
Remove the remaining ethanol with pipette
Air-dry pellet for 7mins 00:07:00

Add 50ul of TE buffer and flick the tube slightly for mixing. DO NOT vortex as it shears DNA. Store at -20oC. 1ul of extracted DNA can be directly used for PCR analysis. Sometimes, expecially when larger amount of tissue is used, it is better to dillute 10X to 100X of the DNA sample before processing PCR.
creator: Yiheng Hu
